methodology.Fees: total fees paid by users from Colony DEX activities.
methodology.Revenue: Revenue distributed to token stakers includes 100% from CLY staking and unstaking fees, 50% of CAI fees, 8% of early-stage activity fees (ceTokens), and 70% of Validator Program activity revenues. This distribution creates a strong APY for CLY stakers, incentivizing protocol staking and long-term involvement in Colony's protocol.
methodology.HoldersRevenue: Revenue distributed to token stakers includes 100% from CLY staking and unstaking fees, 50% of CAI fees, 8% of early-stage activity fees (ceTokens), and 70% of Validator Program activity revenues. This distribution creates a strong APY for CLY stakers, incentivizing protocol staking and long-term involvement in Colony's protocol.
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: 83.33% of the fees collected from Colony DEX transactions are distributed to liquidity providers. Additionally, 10% of ceTokens are distributed to staked liquidity providers on Colony's DEX, incentivizing them to continue providing liquidity and supporting the exchange. Additional revenue can be generated through farm rewards based on specific marketing campaigns and incentive programs.
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Revenue sources directly retained by the protocol include 50% from CAI fees (minting 0.20%, redemption 0.5%, and management 1%), 2% from early-stage platform activities (ceTokens distribution), 2% from USDC fundraised by a project, 16.66% from Colony DEX swap fees, and 30% from Validator Program activities. These funds support the protocol's ongoing development and operations.

methodology.ProtocolRevenue: All revenue collected by protocol.

methodology.Fees: Fees paid by users while using Meowl Discord bot.
methodology.Revenue: All fees are revenue.

methodology.Fees: All treasuryFee, poolFee and keeperFee are collected
All mint, burn, marginAndLiquidation and swap fees are collected and the daily fee amount is determined.
methodology.Revenue: Daily revenue is calculated as 30% of the total fee.

methodology.UserFees: MilkyWay takes 10% fee on users staking rewards
methodology.Fees: Staking rewards earned by all staked TIA
methodology.Revenue: MilkyWay takes 10% fee on users staking rewards
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: MilkyWay takes 10% fee on users staking rewards
methodology.SuplySideRevenue: Staking rewards earned by milkTIA holders

methodology.Fees: Fees from open/close position (0.1%), liquidations, swap (0.2% to 0.8%), mint and burn (based on tokens balance in the pool) and borrow fee ((assets borrowed)/(total assets in pool)*0.01%)
methodology.UserFees: Fees from open/close position (0.1%), swap (0.2% to 0.8%) and borrow fee ((assets borrowed)/(total assets in pool)*0.01%)
methodology.HoldersRevenue: 30% of all collected fees are distributed to MPX stakers
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: 60% of all collected fees are distributed to MLP stakers
methodology.Revenue: Governance revenue is 30% of all collected fees, which are distributed to MPX stakers
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: 10% of all collected fees are distributed to the treasury

methodology.Fees: Fees from open/close position (0.1%), liquidations, swap (0.2% to 0.8%), mint and burn (based on tokens balance in the pool) and borrow fee ((assets borrowed)/(total assets in pool)*0.01%)
methodology.UserFees: Fees from open/close position (0.1%), swap (0.2% to 0.8%) and borrow fee ((assets borrowed)/(total assets in pool)*0.01%)
methodology.HoldersRevenue: 30% of all collected fees are distributed to MPX stakers
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: 60% of all collected fees are distributed to MLP stakers
methodology.Revenue: Governance revenue is 30% of all collected fees, which are distributed to MPX stakers
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: 10% of all collected fees are distributed to the treasury

methodology.UserFees: LPs collect 100% of the fee generated in a pool
methodology.Fees: Fees generated on each swap at a rate set by the pool.
Open/Close position: 0.1% | Swap: 0.2% to 0.8% | Mint and Burn: 0% to 0.85% (based on tokens balance in the pool) | Borrow Fee: `(assets borrowed) / (total assets in pool) * 0.01%`
methodology.UserFees: Open/Close position: 0.1% | Swap: 0.2% to 0.8% | Borrow Fee: (assets borrowed) / (total assets in pool) * 0.01%
methodology.HoldersRevenue: 30% of all collected fees goes to NFI and esNFI stakers
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: 70% of all collected fees goes to NLP holders
methodology.Revenue: Revenue is 30% of all collected fees, which goes to NFI and esNFI stakers
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Treasury has no revenue

methodology.Fees: NFT trading fees paid by users.
methodology.Revenue: NFT trading fees paid by users.

methodology.Fees: Trade collateral collected.
methodology.Revenue: Platform profit, (trader losses minus trader wins).

Fees.Trading Terminal Fees: Fees charged on each trade executed through the trading terminal.

Revenue.Trading Terminal Fees: Trading terminal fees retained by the protocol.

methodology.Fees: Trading fees paid by users while using Padre bot.
methodology.Revenue: All fees are collected by Padre protocol.

methodology.Fees: Swap fees paid by users.
Taker fees paid by traders on each trade, up to 3% of the option premium.
methodology.UserFees: Traders pay taker fees on each trade up to 3% of the option premium.
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: The protocol collects 20% of the taker fees.
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: Liquidity providers earn revenue from market-making options.
methodology.HoldersRevenue: vxPREMIA holders collect 80% of the taker fees.

methodology.Fees: Taker fees paid by traders on each trade, up to 3% of the option premium.
methodology.UserFees: Traders pay taker fees on each trade up to 3% of the option premium.
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: The protocol collects 10% of the taker fees.
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: Liquidity providers collect 50% of the taker fees and earn revenue from market-making options.
methodology.HoldersRevenue: vxPREMIA holders collect 40% of the taker fees.

methodology.Fees: All Trading fees paid by users
methodology.Revenue: All fees are revenue, 70% are burned and 30% is distributed to token holders.
methodology.HoldersRevenue: 70% of fees are burned and 30% of trading fees distributed to QTO stakers.

methodology.Fees: Total fees accumulated by bond sales and trading fees from Protocol-Owned liquidity
methodology.Revenue: 10% of all bond sales and fees go to treasury
methodology.HoldersRevenue: Rewards distributed to holders of staked RZR

methodology.Fees: Trading fees paid by users.
Total fees paid from bot trades
methodology.Revenue: Total fees paid from bot trades
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: 50% of the total fees goes to the treasury
methodology.HoldersRevenue: 50% of the total fees goes to the token holders (doesn't include other revenue sources)

methodology.Fees: Swych collects fees from different transactions done on the Perpetual Exchange.
All fees for adding/removing liquidity, margin, liquidation, and swaps are collected
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: SupplySideRevenue is 80% of the total fees, which are distributed to LP stakers
methodology.Revenue: Revenue is 20% of the total fees

methodology.Fees: All fees comes from synthetic option activation, which are about 1% of the notional value of option.
Daily fees collected from user trading fees

Fees from open/close position (0.1%), swap (stableSwapFee: 0% - 0.06%, swapFee: 0% - 0.85%), deposit and withdraw (based on the total asset amount in the LP pool) and borrow fee ((assets borrowed)/(total assets in pool)*0.01%)
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: 50% of all collected fees goes to WLP holders
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Until waveX’s tokenomics and governance framework are fully established, the remaining 50% of fees will go to the Treasury.

methodology.UserFees: Traders pay taker fees on each trade up to 3% of the option premium.
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: The protocol collects 20% of the taker fees.
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: Liquidity providers earn revenue from market-making options.
methodology.HoldersRevenue: vxPREMIA holders collect 80% of the taker fees.
